name: Atlantic Metals Xchange
description_short: Atlantic Metals Xchange is a credit repair provider based in Charlotte, North Carolina. Rated 4.9/5 with 385 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Atlantic Metals Xchange is a credit repair provider serving clients in Charlotte, North Carolina. With 385 Google reviews and a 4.9/5.0 rating, Atlantic Metals Xchange has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a jewelry buyer, coin dealer, diamond buyer, Atlantic Metals Xchange provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Charlotte, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Atlantic Metals Xchange operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Charlotte, North Carolina area who are considering Atlantic Metals Xchange should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
